title: Fat Dogs
description: Makes dogs CHUNKY. They are chunkier than the earth now :)
body:
![Chunky Dogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b5f7310396a16b3efea32f1959e6b306baf99b.png)


**This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft wolf (tamed dog) model and textures with an absurdly massive, ultra-chunky version. Collars no longer fit properly therefore your doggy will not be able to wear a collar. Purely a joke/meme pack — turns your dogs into chunky pets. No other mobs or gameplay mechanics are affected. Enjoy the CHUNK!** 

### Dependencies:
### [EMF] Entity Model Features
### [ETF] Entity Texture Features
